campbell.title: Campbell City Council — April 21, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to discuss updating the tax rates that businesses pay for their licenses in the city. Shannon Dragman from the finance department presented the proposed changes to these rates, and the council discussed and voted on whether to approve the new rates.
keyTopics: Business license tax rate changes for fiscal year 2026
Finance department presentation on tax updates
Council deliberation and voting on new rates

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — March 18, 2026
saratoga.summary: The city council held a public hearing on March 18, 2026 to get community input on a proposed new rule or regulation. After listening to public comments, they decided to move forward quickly by skipping the usual first reading step and planning to officially adopt the ordinance at their next meeting.
keyTopics: Public hearing held to gather resident feedback on proposed ordinance
Council waived first reading requirement to speed up adoption process
Ordinance scheduled for final vote at next regular council meeting
Specific details of the ordinance not disclosed in agenda summary

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos City Council — April 21, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos City Council met on April 21, 2026, to approve meeting minutes, review the town's finances for February, and authorize several construction and professional service contracts. The council gave the Town Manager permission to sign agreements for construction work and other services to keep town projects and operations moving forward.
keyTopics: Approved previous meeting minutes from April 7
Reviewed February 2026 financial reports and investments
Authorized construction contracts with QLM, Inc. and other vendors
Approved multi-year professional services agreement

san-jose.title: San José City Council — April 29, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to organize upcoming council sessions scheduled for May 5 and May 12, 2026. They reviewed and finalized agendas for both meetings, deciding which items to add, when certain discussions should happen, and what public notice requirements needed to be met.
keyTopics: Finalized the May 5, 2026 meeting agenda with any last-minute items
Scheduled specific times for certain agenda items to be discussed
Reviewed public notice requirements for agenda items and documents
Prepared the draft agenda for the May 12, 2026 meeting
Reviewed public records from April 16-23, 2026

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — April 30, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met to approve meeting minutes and hear directly from residents during public comment. The main focus was reviewing and deciding which neighborhood improvement projects should receive city funding for the 2026-27 budget year.
keyTopics: Neighborhood grant funding decisions for 2026-27
Public comment period for residents
Review of meeting minutes
Neighborhood meeting attendance and engagement
Committee reports and council discussion

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — April 28, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held a special evening meeting on April 28, 2026, to interview candidates for various city boards and commissions. Residents had opportunities to participate both in person and online to watch the proceedings and provide public comments.
keyTopics: Interviews for city board and commission positions
In-person public comment opportunities
Online participation options for residents
Study session format meeting

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — April 30, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met on April 30, 2026 to approve meeting notes from the Economic Development Committee's January and March sessions. The council also opened the floor for residents to speak about any issues they wanted to raise, with each person getting three minutes to talk.
keyTopics: Approval of Economic Development Committee minutes from January 2026
Approval of Economic Development Committee minutes from March 2026
Public comment period for residents on any city matters

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — April 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara City Council met to discuss allowing large promotional signs to be displayed on buildings around Levi's Stadium during the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The council also approved a new three-year contract with the firefighters union covering pay and working conditions.
keyTopics: Temporary oversized signs permitted near Levi's Stadium for World Cup 2026 events
New firefighter contract agreement for 2026-2029
One agenda item was withdrawn by staff before the meeting

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — April 21, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held a meeting on April 21, 2026 where they discussed and voted on the city's next budget, approved tax rules, and set new fees for city services. The council also heard a presentation about efforts to address homelessness in Santa Clara County.
keyTopics: Approved the 2026-27 city budget and development fees
Reissued tax equity and fiscal responsibility rules
Updated user fees for city services
Discussed Santa Clara County's homelessness action plan
Approved previous meeting minutes and scheduled upcoming meetings

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — April 29, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council met to discuss routine business items and held a public hearing about a development proposal at 4103 Old Trace Road. A developer wants to split a vacant lot into nine residential properties and build nine single-family homes plus seven smaller accessory dwelling units on the property.
keyTopics: 4103 Old Trace Road subdivision proposal - converting 1 lot into 9 residential lots
Nine new single-family homes and seven junior accessory dwelling units planned
Environmental review already completed under state law (CEQA exempt)
Election of council leadership positions (Chair and Vice Chair)
Administrative items - meeting schedules and assignments
